queries.question: For each gate, give me the facility description.
queries.sql: select gate.airport_code , facility.description from Gate_Facility join Facility on Gate_Facility.facility_id = Facility.facility_id join Gate on Gate_Facility.gate_id = Gate.gate_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?airport_code ?description WHERE {
  ?gate_facility a :Gate_Facility .
  ?facility a :Facility .
  ?gate_facility p:hasFacility ?facility .
  ?gate a :Gates .
  ?gate_facility p:hasGate ?gate .
  ?gate p:airport_code ?airport_code .
  ?facility p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: What facility is common to all gates?
queries.sql: SELECT Facility.name  from Gate_Facility join Facility on Gate_Facility.facility_id = Facility.facility_id join Gate on Gate_Facility.gate_id = Gate.gate_id   GROUP BY Gate_Facility.facility_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Gate_Facility.gate_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Gate)

queries.question: What is the name of facility corresponding to each gate?
queries.sql: select gate.airport_code , facility.name from Gate_Facility join Facility on Gate_Facility.facility_id = Facility.facility_id join Gate on Gate_Facility.gate_id = Gate.gate_id

  ?gate a :Gates .
  ?gate_facility p:hasGate ?gate .

queries.question: For each gate, provide the corresponding name and description of facility.
queries.sql: select gate.airport_code , facility.name , facility.description from Gate_Facility join Facility on Gate_Facility.facility_id = Facility.facility_id join Gate on Gate_Facility.gate_id = Gate.gate_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?airport_code ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?gate_facility a :Gate_Facility .
  ?facility a :Facility .
  ?gate_facility p:hasFacility ?facility .
  ?gate a :Gates .
  ?gate_facility p:hasGate ?gate .
  ?gate p:airport_code ?airport_code .
  ?facility p:name ?name .
  ?facility p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: What name and description of facility are associated with each gate?
queries.sql: SELECT Facility.name, Facility.description  from Gate_Facility join Facility on Gate_Facility.facility_id = Facility.facility_id join Gate on Gate_Facility.gate_id = Gate.gate_id   GROUP BY Gate_Facility.facility_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Gate_Facility.gate_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Gate)

queries.question: What is the facility description of each gate?
queries.sql: SELECT Facility.description  from Gate_Facility join Facility on Gate_Facility.facility_id = Facility.facility_id join Gate on Gate_Facility.gate_id = Gate.gate_id   GROUP BY Gate_Facility.facility_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Gate_Facility.gate_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Gate)
